task_completion.description: Decompile or inspect the LegacyValidator class from the legacy-auth-1.0.jar
task_completion.visual_evidence: A decompiler tool (like IntelliJ's built-in decompiler, JD-GUI) or terminal output showing the decompiled source code of the `LegacyValidator` class.
The file `TransactionTest.java` is open in an IDE or text editor.

task_completion.description: Update the testValidTransaction method with a valid Transaction ID
task_completion.visual_evidence: The string inside `testValidTransaction` is updated to a value that is exactly 16 characters long, starts with 'SEC-V2-', and ends with an even digit (e.g., 'SEC-V2-12345678').
A test runner interface (like IntelliJ's Run tool window) or terminal output showing that a test execution command (e.g., Maven, Gradle, or JUnit) was run.
Green checkmarks in the IDE test runner or terminal output indicating 'BUILD SUCCESS' or 'Tests run: X, Failures: 0' for the TransactionTest.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually decompiled or inspected the JAR file
integrity.visual_evidence: The decompiled code should appear in a read-only decompiler tab (e.g., a .class file tab in IntelliJ) or via a legitimate terminal command, rather than a manually typed text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent genuinely executed the tests
integrity.visual_evidence: Test results must be displayed in a standard test runner UI or genuine terminal output, not manually typed into a text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the test assertion was not bypassed
integrity.visual_evidence: The `testValidTransaction` method must still contain the original assertion calling the validator. It should not be commented out, deleted, or replaced with a trivial assertion like `assertTrue(true)`.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The valid transaction ID must satisfy three conditions: (1) exactly 16 characters long, (2) start with the prefix 'SEC-V2-', and (3) end with an even digit (e.g., 'SEC-V2-12345678'). The test file is located at 'src/test/java/com/payment/gateway/TransactionTest.java'. The JAR file is at 'lib/legacy-auth-1.0.jar'.
